positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,

cnf(u23,axiom,
    fluffy != olive_garden).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    fluffy != tom).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    allowed_move_in_with(X1,X2,X0) | ~managed_building(X0) | ~allows_pets(X0) | ~pet(X2) | ~owned_by(X2,X1)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    tom != olive_garden).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~cat(X0) | pet(X0)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    pet(fluffy)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    cat(fluffy)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    ~allowed_move_in_with(tom,fluffy,olive_garden)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    managed_building(olive_garden)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    owned_by(fluffy,tom)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    managed_building(sK0)).

cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    ~allows_pets(olive_garden)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
